list.name: device
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM interface_latest FINAL WHERE device_name != '' ORDER BY device_name

list.name: interface
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT if_name FROM interface WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND if_name != '' ORDER BY if_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, concat(device_name, ' / ', if_name) AS series, avg(in_rate_bps) AS in_bps, avg(out_rate_bps) AS out_bps FROM interface WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND if_name IN ($interface) AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, concat(device_name, ' / ', if_name) AS series, avg(in_utilization_pct) AS in_util, avg(out_utilization_pct) AS out_util FROM interface WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND if_name IN ($interface) AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, sum(in_errors) AS in_errors, sum(out_errors) AS out_errors, sum(in_discards) AS in_discards, sum(out_discards) AS out_discards FROM interface WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND if_name IN ($interface) AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT device_name, if_name, if_speed_mbps, admin_status, oper_status, in_rate_bps, out_rate_bps, in_utilization_pct, out_utilization_pct, executed_at FROM interface_latest FINAL WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND if_name IN ($interface) ORDER BY device_name, if_name
